content.observe: This bunker was never alone. Other systems exist beyond it, reachable only through a network none of us built ourselves.
content.fault: You're trying to reach a resource that isn't local anymore. It lives on another node, and the request just left this system entirely.

hotspots.label: Node A (this Bunker)
hotspots.detail: One machine in a network of independent, cooperating systems.

hotspots.label: Node B
hotspots.detail: A separate system reachable only through the network.

hotspots.label: Network
hotspots.detail: The link that lets independent nodes appear as one coordinated system.
